It's VERY TOUGH! Crush se thoda zyada, forever se thoda kam,Ek kahaani jo shuru hui thi with a smile and some fun Jis naam pe kabhi smile automatically aa jaati thi, Har notification jiski exciting lagi thi. Guess the person, don't overthink
Jo bina bole mood samajh jaaye,Aur bina permission fries utha le jaaye. Us legend ko yaad karo zara
